name: Luvu Brands, Inc.
summary: Luvu Brands, Inc. designs, manufactures, and markets consumer lifestyle products under three brands: Liberator (sexual wellness and intimacy products), Jaxx (casual fashion daybeds, sofas, and beanbags made from polyurethane foam), and Avana (yoga, sleep comfort, and inclined bed therapy products). Operating from a 140,000-square-foot vertically integrated facility in Atlanta, Georgia, the company sells through its own e-commerce websites, online mass merchants, and specialty retail stores worldwide.

products.name: Liberator Bedroom Adventure Gear
products.description: Patented foam-based shapes and props designed to enhance sexual positioning and intimacy, available in various fabrics and colors.

products.name: Jaxx
products.description: Casual fashion daybeds, sofas, and beanbags made from virgin and repurposed polyurethane foam.

products.name: Avana
products.description: Products for yoga exercises, sleep comfort, and inclined bed therapy.

partnerships.description: Outsourced sewing of certain high-volume products to a contract sewing facility in Mexico.
